title: Project Fright
description: Filled to the brim with horror content. Over 140  mobs!
body:
![Project Fright Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3b573336e3483fbc168cfc92acb154bb51c3382.png)

The aim of this mod is to create a progressive survival experience to fight against the horrific mobs that plunge your world into darkness. 

With future updates planned to add dimensions, ores, and tons more mobs that the player will face in their everlasting journey to conquer all the realms and to destroy evil. 

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/42fy0mvoFd0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1117a3c6a330b2cd0e26ea43a6d3e75862fc57f.png)
---
- You can find more than _**140**_ mobs to fight
- Over **_40_** weapons to collect
- Trap blocks (beartrap, punji stakes, landmine, barbed wire)
- Camp Crystal Lake, Slender Forest, and Salt Flats (Biomes)
- Custom Advancements
- New blocks
- Lots of items (some wip)
- Custom Spawn Eggs

![Planned](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4b9133fd31e4502f09de03bc7c37b756afa9c57.png)
---
- Structures
- More Biomes
- More Advancements
- MANY more Mobs
- Many more Weapons
- Bosses
- Dimensions
- Full Survival Compatibility
- Wiki? (Looking for wiki helpers)

**FAQ**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Can I put this into my modpack?
=
Absolutely! Just be sure to credit please :)

Will there ever be an update to X version? (1.7.10 for example)
=
I plan to always keep the mod updated closer to the recent updates. It will take time for me to release the latest version, so the mod will be on 1.20 for a while before 1.21. That said, backporting is not in my best of interests, sorry.

Do the mobs spawn in survival?
=
Yes, but not all of them! Check the Excel Spreadsheet for now to see the data on every mob. Currently looking for wiki makers to make it better than a spreadsheet.

How do I get X in survival? (Necronomicon for example)
=
Currently, the mod is in beta stage, so some things are W.I.P. The Necronomicon especially is a huge undertaking, as I plan to add a beastiary inside, hope to someday to show off my awesome pixel art in that book. There will be a time for everything to join the survival fold eventually.

Can you add X to the mod?
=
With every suggestion, I suggest you join my discord, and suggest as much as you want in my requests tab. That way players can input on your suggestion, to see if maybe its popular enough to be added. I also recommend joining to take part in Polls and Voting.

</details>

---
#### Can you survive the against the plethora of new mobs? Or will you perish and become their next victim!
